narrative:
Precinct Ironspot (precinct in Muskingum County) has 338 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
